baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: CCEP exhibits moderate valuation (PE 18.4, PEG 0.48) and stable fundamentals (Q2 2024 net margin 8.11%), but macro regime is overheat/moderately restrictive (equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution). No catalyst identified: news_event_summary is empty post-cutoff, alternative_data_features are disconnected (no tech/consumer/regulatory signals), and information_integrity_assessment flags low-tier sources only with uncorroborated status. Ownership data absent. Price action shows 5d decline (-4.47%) with elevated relative volume (1.80x), but without corroborating catalyst or external alt-data verification, insufficient evidence to initiate position. Macro regime caps equity allocation at 20%; quality_long sleeve would require stronger catalyst + alt-data support. Surge_short sleeve not met (no negative catalyst, no short-specific veto triggers). Fail-closed to no_trade pending upstream multi-agent decomposition.

T+2: Catalyst identification → news_event_summary status=data_unavailable (20 items dropped post-cutoff); no narrative driver found

T+3: External corroboration check → alternative_data_features adapters not wired (github_public unmapped, sec_13f unavailable); information_integrity_assessment marks sources as low-tier uncorroborated
T+4: Fundamental analysis → Q2 2024 revenue 9.8B, net margin 8.11%, gate_38 passes (eps>0, op_margin>0, financial_health=sound); valuation moderate (PE 18.42, PEG 0.48)
T+5: Ownership assessment → sentiment_community_ownership_evidence.ownership_positioning status=not_evaluated; no institutional sponsorship or insider activity data
T+6: Price action interpretation → 5d return -4.47%, relative volume 1.80x; ambiguous without catalyst context

T+7: Sleeve eligibility check → quality_long candidate_type; macro discipline + missing catalyst + uncorroborated alt-data prevent quality_long initiation; surge_short not applicable (no negative catalyst)

T+8: Veto evaluation → insufficient_evidence=true (catalyst absent, alt-data disconnected, ownership missing), missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true, information_integrity_veto=true (uncorroborated sources)
T+9: Final decision → veto conditions tripped; decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0
